flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Johns Hopkins University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.7k → $65.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Johns Hopkins University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.7k → $65.2k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Johns Hopkins University are 1% above 6-year earnings ($86.3k → $87.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Johns Hopkins University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
